# AutoLabels.io

> The dealer label platform that powers every sticker, addendum, and Buyers Guide. Scan a VIN, build a label, capture a lead, sign a deal.

AutoLabels.io is a SaaS for franchise and independent auto dealers. It generates new-car Monroney addendums, used-car stickers, FTC Buyers Guides (English + Spanish), and digital deal addendums with tamper-evident e-signatures (UETA / E-SIGN). It includes a 50-state disclosure engine, NHTSA recall lookup, VIN decode, dealer-website scraping, prep sign-off compliance gating, and live analytics. Part of the Autocurb family of dealer apps.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, pricing, FAQ.
- [About](/about): How the platform works — Decode, Stick, Sign, Close.
- [Brand](/brand): Brand guidelines and logo usage.
- [Sign in](/login): Dealer login.
- [Get started](/onboarding): Standalone signup wizard.

## Optional

- [Scan a VIN](/scan): Public VIN scan entry point for in-store use.
